title: deprea oxapampensis
intro: Deprea oxapampensis, also known as the Oxapampa thorn apple, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. The plant contains tropane alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties. Deprea oxapampensis is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antispasmodic, making it a potential treatment for various conditions. Herbal preparations of Deprea oxapampensis may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
